things.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
things.description: 240-acre garden commissioned by Hyder Ali in 1760 — home to a 3,000-million-year-old rock and a 200-year-old glass house

things.name: Bangalore Palace
things.description: Tudor-inspired 1887 palace of the Mysore royal family — fortified towers, carved wood interiors and lawns

things.name: Mysore Day Trip
things.description: The City of Palaces — the magnificent Mysore Palace illuminated by 100,000 bulbs on Sunday evenings

things.name: Cubbon Park
things.description: 300-acre Victorian-era park in the heart of the city — the green lungs of Bangalore with statues and library

things.name: ISKCON Temple
things.description: One of the world's largest ISKCON temples — stunning marble structure with nightly cultural programmes

things.name: Commercial Street Shopping
things.description: Bangalore's most famous shopping street — textiles, handicrafts, silver jewellery and fashion at bargain prices

things.name: Vidhana Soudha
things.description: India's largest state legislature building — grandiose neo-Dravidian architecture best seen floodlit at night

things.name: Nandi Hills
things.description: Ancient hilltop fort 60 km north — sunrise views above the clouds and Tipu Sultan's summer palace

things.name: Craft Beer & Pub Culture
things.description: India's craft beer capital — Toit, Windmills and Arbor Brewing Company are among India's finest brew pubs

things.name: Bull Temple (Dodda Ganesha)
things.description: Massive 4.5-metre granite Nandi bull shrine dating to the 16th century — active local pilgrimage site
